topic: My ceiling fan rotates counterclockwise every Sunday and the chain does not turn with the blades
title: My Ceiling Fan Rotates Counterclockwise Every Sunday. The Chain Stays Still. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My ceiling fan rotates counterclockwise every Sunday. The pull chain does not turn with the blades.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a vintage brass ceiling fan rotating in a small living room at dusk, the pull chain visible hanging perfectly still beneath the motor housing, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Nineteen seventies ranch house. Original brass fan. Original chain.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small wood paneled living room with a single brass ceiling fan in the center of the ceiling, dim afternoon light, no people visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep it on low all summer.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a brass ceiling fan motor housing with a small low setting indicator visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed last June. Sunday afternoon. Blades going the wrong direction.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a ceiling fan with the blades motion blurred rotating in a reverse direction, dim warm sunlight through a curtain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Checked the housing switch. Set to summer.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hand reaching up to the side of a ceiling fan motor housing pointing at a small toggle switch, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Cut the power at the breaker.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open electrical breaker box on a wall with one switch flipped down to the off position, dim basement light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Blades kept turning. Chain perfectly still.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a rotating ceiling fan with the chain hanging completely motionless beneath it, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Removed the chain Sunday morning. Tools on the floor.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a pair of needle nose pliers and a small brass chain laying on a hardwood living room floor beneath a ceiling fan, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Monday the chain was reattached. Same notch. Same length.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a brass ceiling fan with the pull chain reattached and hanging neatly beneath the motor housing, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Replaced the entire fan with a new one.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a brand new white ceiling fan installed in the living room, the old brass fan visible in a cardboard box on the floor, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The new fan reverses every Sunday too. Chain still still.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the new white ceiling fan rotating counterclockwise with its chain hanging perfectly motionless beneath it, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The old brass fan is in the garage. I can hear it spinning out there too.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a dim detached garage at night with the brass ceiling fan resting on a workbench, motion blur visible on its blades, dim single bulb light, vertical 9:16 framing
